# Toolique - Complete Catalog & Technical Reference for LLMs

## Overview
Toolique (https://www.toolique.in) is a free, privacy-focused online suite of interactive calculators, developer utilities, 3D printing tools, and programming academy modules. All computations run 100% locally in the user's browser using HTML5, Web APIs, and client-side JavaScript. No user input or calculations are transmitted to external servers.

## Categories & Tools

### 3D Printing & Fabrication
- Filament Cost Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/filament-cost-calculator
- 3D Printing Cost Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/3d-printing-cost-calculator
- Print Profit Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/print-profit-calculator
- Print Farm Revenue Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/print-farm-revenue-calculator
- Filament Weight Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/filament-weight-calculator
- STL Volume Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/stl-volume-calculator
- Resin Cost & Volume Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/resin-cost-calculator
- AMS Slot Planner: https://www.toolique.in/tool/ams-slot-planner
- HueForge Layer Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/hueforge-layer-calculator

### Finance & Tax (Optimized for India & Global Standards)
- Advanced BOQ Calculator India: https://www.toolique.in/tools/advanced-boq-calculator-india
- GST Calculator India: https://www.toolique.in/tool/gst-calculator
- Income Tax Calculator India: https://www.toolique.in/tool/income-tax-calculator
- SIP & Mutual Fund Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/sip-calculator
- EMI Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/emi-calculator
- HRA Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/hra-calculator
- Inflation & FD Calculator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/fd-calculator

### Developer & Technical Utilities
- JSON Formatter & Validator: https://www.toolique.in/tool/json-formatter
- Base64 Encoder / Decoder: https://www.toolique.in/tool/base64-encoder-decoder
- Regex Tester & Visualizer: https://www.toolique.in/tool/regex-tester
- JWT Debugger: https://www.toolique.in/tool/jwt-decoder
- Developer Sandbox: https://www.toolique.in/playground

### Math Studio
- Matrix Arithmetic Solver: https://www.toolique.in/tool/matrix-calculator
- Symbolic & Numerical Equation Solver: https://www.toolique.in/tool/equation-solver
- Derivative & Integral Calculus Calculators: https://www.toolique.in/tool/derivative-calculator
- Descriptive & Inferential Statistics: https://www.toolique.in/tool/statistics-calculator

### Toolique Academy
- Technical Interview Prep Hub: https://www.toolique.in/academy
- SQL Track & Challenges: https://www.toolique.in/academy/sql
- Python Track & Challenges: https://www.toolique.in/academy/python
- JavaScript Track & Challenges: https://www.toolique.in/academy/javascript
- React Track & Challenges: https://www.toolique.in/academy/react
- QA Automation & Testing Track: https://www.toolique.in/academy/qa
- Visual Explainers (SQL JOINs, Data Structures): https://www.toolique.in/academy/learn
- Sandboxed Playgrounds (SQL, JS, Python): https://www.toolique.in/academy/playgrounds

## Entity & Publisher Information
- Publisher: Toolique (https://www.toolique.in/#organization)
- Founder: Ajinkya Swami (https://www.toolique.in/about-founder#person)
- Primary Domain: https://www.toolique.in
- Contact Email: support@toolique.in
